titleStmt.title: SII 19.211: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 211. (A.R. No. 216 of 1926.) KĪḺAPPAḺUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, PAŚUPATĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records the sale of 2 mā of land to Chaṇḍēśvara-Bhaṭāra in the temple of Maṟavaṉīśvara at Śiṟu-Paḻuvūr a brahmadēya Kuṉṟa-kūṟṟam for 8 kaḻañju of ‘fire tested pure’ gold by two brothers Iravi Vaḍugaṉ and Iravi-Dattaṉ of Tirunallūr a brahmadēya in Maṟaik-kūṟṟam. The name of the temple is suggestive of its origin to a Paḻavēṭṭaraiyar chief Maṟavaṉ Kaṇḍaṉ in the reign of Parāntaka I whose inscription (No. 278 of 1926) is also found here. In early times the transactions of a Śiva temple were all done in the name of Chaṇḍēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 8Āvatu vaṭakarai maṟaikkūṟṟa
ttu brahmadeyam tirunallūr vārkkiyaṉ Iravivaṭukaṉum Iravitattaṉum Ivvi
ruvom kuṉṟakkūṟṟattu brahmataiyañ ciṟupaḻuvūr maṟavaṉiśvarattu caṇḍe
śvarabhiṭārarkku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu ciṟupaḻuvūr ceṅkuḷattu tū
mpiṉkiḻ kiḻkaḻaṉi peruvāykkāliṉ vaṭavāykkāl Eṅkaḷ Iraṇṭu māvukku kiḻpāṟ
kellai caṅkaraṉiraviyun tampimāru nilattukku meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai puḷḷa
maṅkalattu pālāciriyaṉ nārāyaṇa ṉiraviyun tampiyum Aṉubhavikkiṉṟa nilat
tukkum peruvāykkālukkum vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai cāttamaṅkalattu pā
lāciriyaṉ Akkiraṉ Aṉubhavikkiṉṟa nilattukkum caṭaiyaṉ kiraṉ Aṉubhavikkiṉṟa
nilattukkuṅ kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Iccaṭaiyaṉ kiraṉ Aṉubhavikkiṉṟa nilattukku
vārkkiyaṉ Ūr ṉilakaṇṭasomāciyār kalattilākiṉṟa nilattu ceṭṭi māṟi strīdhanam
peṟṟuṭaiyarom Āḷkiṉṟa nilattukku teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyil Akap
paṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭu mā mikutikkuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koṇṭa vilaipporuḷ tippo
kkuccempoṉ Eṇkaḻañcum kaiyile koṇṭu Eṇkaḻañcukkum vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu yituve
vilaiyāvaṇamākavum veṟu poruḷmāvaṟuti poruṭcilavu kāṭṭa kaṭavaraṉṟi viṟ
ṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom ciṟupaḻuvūr maṟavaṉiśvarattu caṇḍeśva
rabhiṭārarkku Iravivaṭukaṉum Iravitattaṉum Ivviruvom paṉmāyeśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.211 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
